modern_reader_context.market_surface_rule: Use train commute, station platform, conbini, cram school, club room, LINE-style chat, digital manga apps, capsule machines, and quiet public etiquette.
modern_reader_context.audience_story_rule: Treat online identity, economic pressure, burnout, social performance, fandom, romance boundaries, and self-definition as ordinary life texture.
modern_reader_context.genre_relevance_rule: Modern healing must receive everyday overstimulation gently: notifications, transit noise, school/work fatigue, convenience rituals, and weather.

catalyst.logline: A saved receipt from an ordinary snack leads the protagonist back to one small routine they thought grief had erased.

modern_reader_context.craft_directive: Fuse the genre engine with a contemporary reader-world entrypoint. Market=ja_JP; audience=gen_z. Transmutation: Receipt becomes memory vessel. Market surface: Use train commute, station platform, conbini, cram school, club room, LINE-style chat, digital manga apps, capsule machines, and quiet public etiquette. panels.scene: Dead phone; vending machine hums; conbini receipt, snack wrapper, evening walk, kettle.
panels.action: He buys warm tea from the vending machine. Phone stays dark.
panels.narration: The ritual is buying tea when the phone dies.
Breath slows. The quiet costs him the urge to fix everything.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.text: I want to stay until the last train, not scroll.

dialogue_lines.speaker: A
dialogue_lines.text: I want to stay until the last train, not scroll.
